coding.display: Acute gangrenous appendicitis with perforation AND peritonitis (disorder)
Acute appendicitis with generalized peritonitis, without abscess
Acute appendicitis with perforation and localized peritonitis, with abscess

note.text: Operative findings refined diagnosis from acute perforated appendicitis to acute gangrenous appendicitis with perforation. Appendix visually confirmed gangrenous with transmural involvement and visible perforation at distal tip.

Pathology confirmed (accession SP-2026-00412, resulted 2026-01-14): Acute gangrenous appendicitis with transmural necrosis and perforation. Acute serositis with fibrinopurulent exudate. No neoplasm identified. Margins uninvolved. Status post laparoscopic appendectomy; documented as discharge diagnosis.
